SPEED AND CONSUMPTIONS AT SEA
SPEED/CONSUMPTION IS GIVEN IN GOOD WEATHER DAYS ONLY AND UNDERSTOOD TO MEAN DAYS DEFINED THE ONES OF MINIMUM 24 CONSECUTIVE STEAMING HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON TO NOON IN OPEN AND DEEP SEA, IN WINDS UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT 4 (I.E UP TO 16 KTS) AND/OR SEA STATE 3 DEFINED UP TO 1.25M
SIGNIFICANT COMBINED WAVE HEIGHT, WITH NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL/ NO ADVERSE CURRENTS. FAVORABLE CURRENTS ARE NOT TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT AND NOT ANY DEDUCTION IS ALLOWED DUE TO CURRENT FACTOR IN THE VESSEL\'S AVERAGE SPEED. EXTRAPOLATION AS PER ENGLISH LAW AND FROM "GOOD WEATHER" PERFORMANCE FOR "BAD WEATHER" PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.
VSLS CONSUMES MDO IN MAIN ENGINE WHILE MANEUVERING IN/OUT OF THE PORTS, CANALS, RIVERS, NARROW WATERS, FOGS ETC.
